description_long: This is a large, heavily armored combat vehicle resembling a main battle tank, painted in a matte desert yellow with elaborate dragon-themed artwork in red, green, and white across the turret and hull. The vehicle features a long, prominent main cannon mounted on a rotating turret, with additional weaponry such as a machine gun visible on the turret roof. The hull is wide and low, with thick, sloped armor plating covering the front, sides, and rear, and reinforced side skirts protecting the suspension and tracks. The running gear consists of six large road wheels per side, supported by robust metal tracks designed for traversing rough terrain. The surface is detailed with hatches, vents, and storage compartments, and the overall build suggests a focus on both firepower and survivability in urban or battlefield environments.
description: A heavily armored, desert-yellow main battle tank with dragon artwork, a long cannon, and reinforced tracks. Features include a rotating turret, machine gun, and detailed armor plating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sloped glacis plate, main cannon, and dragon artwork wrapping over the turret and hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the cannon, six large road wheels, and the detailed dragon motif on the turret.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine deck, rear armor, and the tail end of the dragon artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the tracks, side armor, and the continuation of the dragon design.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret front, one machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the front, sides, and rear; reinforced side skirts over the tracks; visually robust and continuous.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Desert yellow base with elaborate dragon artwork in red, green, and white; no traditional camouflage pattern.
